category_sources: source_facts.description says Filebeat harvests files and ships logs to Elasticsearch or Logstash.
source_facts.homepage is Elastic's official Filebeat product page.
display_name_sources: Elastic official product and docs pages use the display name Filebeat.
docs_sources: Elastic official documentation provides a Filebeat reference section.
Elastic official guide provides current Filebeat documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/elastic/beats, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes harvesting and shipping log files.
source_facts.homepage identifies Filebeat as part of Elastic Beats.
